name: Samurai Punch
author: Poki
description: Samurai Punch is a simulation game where you train to become the ultimate samurai! Master weightlifting, sharpen your sword skills, and hit bullseyes with your arrows. Challenge rival samurai in epic duels to earn money and unlock new training zones. And don’t forget, finding your true love might just give you the boost you need! Ready to rise through the ranks and become a legendary warrior? How to play Samurai Punch? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Samurai Punch? Samurai Punch is created by Panda Pasha Games. Play their other games on Poki: Survival Island , Prison Punch , Fishing World and Blacksmith Tycoon ! How can I play Samurai Punch for free? You can play Samurai Punch for free on Poki. Can I play Samurai Punch on mobile devices and desktop? Samurai Punch can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
